upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra yaH purURi gAhate takzad vaneva SocizA (f॰1.127.4) uBayatra praSabdena nArTaH arTopajanABAvAt
'pravigAhyodakaM tIrRaM vanAni Palavanti ca' (rA॰6.16.2) praSabdena nArTaH vigAhyetyavagAhyeti vAha samAne vigAhanAvagAhane
'asyAM nadyAM supuRyAyAM yaTezwam…avagAhyatAm' (BA0 vana0 9933) avatIrya snAyatAm ityarTaH
'samprApya paRqitaH kfcCraM prajYAmevAvagAhate' (rA0 36853) vicAramagno Bavati kfcCravAraRopAyaM cintayatItyAha
'avagAQA ca pItA ca (gaNgA) punAtyA saptamaM kulam' (BA0 vana0 8593) avagAQA praveSapUrvakaM kftasnAnA avagAQaH pradozaH (avi0 3) avatIrRa ityarTaH
'aByunnatA purastAdavagAQA jaGanagOravAt paScAt' (padapaNktiH) (SA0 38) avagAQA magnA nyagBAvaM gatA nyaknA
'avagAQaM Bavatyagre viparItaM tu yozitaH' (bf0 Slo0 saM0 924) ukto'rTaH
'avagAQA dvizanto me suKI vAto'BivAti mAm' (BA0 vi0 68 75) avagAQAH parABUtAH
'tamopahantrIM tamasAM vagAhya' (raGu0 740) tamasAM nadImavagAhya tatra snAtvetyarTaH
'eza viprEraBizwuto'po devo vigAhate' (f0 936) apaH samudraM praviSati apsu nimajjati
'duHKena hi vigAhyate pracakitE rAjYAM gfhaM vArDivat' (paYcata0 1420) ukto'rTaH
'aTAtmanaH SabdaguRaM guRajYaH padaM vimAnena vigAhamAnaH' (raGu0 131) vigAhamAnaH=atikrAman
'vigAhyamAnAM sarayUM ca nOBiH' (paSyan reme) (raGu0 1430) vigAhyamAnA=viloqyamAnA kzoBamApAdyamAnA
'vigAQAyAM rajanyAM ca rAjA dEnyaM paraM gataH' (BA0 droRa0 18320) vigAQA=avatIrRA
'vigAQe yuDi sambADe vatsyase mAm' (BA0 31614) vigAQe vfdDimupeyuzi
'iha vihArasuKaM dayitAsaKaH sarasi ko rasiko na vigAhate' (pArijAta0 1040) vigAhate'nuBavati aSnute nirviSati

'tamuvAcATa sAvitrI rajanI vyavagAhate' (BA0 vana0 29773) vyavagAhate'vatarati vyavayorupasargayoH Sakya ekataro hAtum ihEvAgrime Sloke vigAQA rajanI ceyaM nivfttaSca divAkara iti SravaraRAt tatra vigAQA'vatIrRetyevArTaH
'duryoDano mahArAja vyavAgAhata tadbalam' (BA0 droRa0 15311) sudUraM prAviSadityarTaH
'viSvA uta tvayA vayaM DArA udanyA iva ati gAhemahi dvizaH' (f0 273) atigAhemahi atikrAmema upaplavemahi
'aBi gotrARi sahasA gAhamAnaH' (f0 101037) aBigAhamAno viloqayamAnaH sudUramantaH praviSannityarTaH
'pratigAhante vanAni' (rA0 37634) pratigAhante'ntaH praviSanti haWAt praviSantIti vA
